chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD 1st Appeal No. 10 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.03.2025 For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Sabir Hussain, Advocate for appellants Mr. Mashooq Ali Mangi, Advocate for respondent This court vide order dated 11.3.2024 suspended the operation of Impugned judgment subject to furnishing surety equal to decreetal amount of Rs. 20,00,000/- (Rupees twenty lacs) with the Additional Registrar of this Court within seven days. Counsel for appellants states that in compliance of the above order the surety as required by this court has been submitted with the Additional Registrar of this court. Learned Counsel further submits that his defence before the Trial Court was struck of as he failed to submit the surety as required by the Trial Court, hence his version before the Trial Court has gone unrebutted and unchallenged; therefore, the case may be remanded to the Trial Court for proceeding on merits. Accordingly, for the above reasons, this 1st Appeal is disposed of in court today remanding the matter to the Trial Court for proceeding on merits. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
